feed.title: DealWatch Updates
feed.subtitle: Canonical release and changelog entrypoints for DealWatch.

entry.title: Latest release notes
entry.summary: The stable entrypoint for the newest DealWatch release notes and public change summary. Latest tagged release: v0.1.2.

entry.title: Release history
entry.summary: The canonical GitHub release history for DealWatch without copying version text into site pages.

entry.title: Changelog
entry.summary: The repository changelog remains the written release ledger behind the public release surface.
